urdu transliteration text: LA ILAHA ILLALLAH MUHAMMADIN RASOOL ALLAH KI LAAZAWAL DARSGAAH HUSSAIN HAI
english translation text: The never declining university of La Ilaha Illallah Muhammadin Rasool Allah is Hussain

urdu transliteration text: NA JISKI KOI MISAAL HAI NA JISKI KOI NAZEER HAI, WOH BEMISAAL SHEHANSHA HUSSAIN HAI
english translation text: The one who doesn’t have anyone like him, that unique Emperor is Hussain

urdu transliteration text: HUSSAIN LA ILAH KI ZINDAGI, HUSSAIN AMBIYA KI BANDAGI
english translation text: Hussain is the life of Islam, Hussain is the life of all the Prophets.

urdu transliteration text: LA ILAH SE POOCH LO KE SAARI KAAINAAT MEIN SIRF BINA-E-LA ILAH HUSSAIN HAI
english translation text: Ask Allah, in the entire universe, the savior of Islam is Hussain.

urdu transliteration text: HUSSAIN DEEN KA SHABAB HAI, HUSSAIN DARD KI KITAAB HAI,
english translation text: Hussain is the youth of Religion, Hussain is the book of suffering

urdu transliteration text: KAFAN KE BANND KHOL KAR BULAYA JISKO MAAN NE KHUD, WO FATIMA KA LADLA HUSSAIN HAI
english translation text: Despite being shrouded, Bibi Fatema, called out to him, that beloved of Fatima is Hussain

urdu transliteration text:
TARAP CHUKI SHABEEH-E-MUSTAFA, MAGAR HUSSAIN HE DATTA HUA,
Hazrat Ali Akber trembled but Hussain was steadfast
PISAR JAWAN KI LAASH PE HAI MUTMAIN KHARA RAHA YE WO KHALIL-E-KARBALA HUSSAIN HAI
english translation text: Standing content at the body of his son, that Ibrahim of Karbala is Hussain

urdu transliteration text: APNE KHOON KA GHUSAL MILA, KAFAN HAI JISKA KHAAK-E-KARBALA
english translation text: His Ghusl was done in his own blood, His kafan was the sand of Karbala

urdu transliteration text: DAFAN BEHAN NA KAR SAKI HAI DHOOP MEIN PARA RAHA YE WO GHAREEB-E-KARBALA HUSSAIN HAI,
english translation text: Bibi Zaynab could not bury him, his body lay under the sun, that lonely man of Karbala is Hussain

urdu transliteration text: HARAM MEIN HASHR KA SAMA HUA, PHUPHI SE JAB SAKINA NE YE KAHA,
english translation text: It was like the day of Judgement when Bibi Sakina told her aunt

urdu transliteration text: MUJHE NA NEEND AATI HAI MAIN SOUN KISKE SEENE PAR KAHAN CHALA GAYA MERA HUSSAIN HAI,
english translation text: I cannot sleep, on whose chest should I sleep on, where is my Hussain?

urdu transliteration text: LA ILAHA ILLAH MUHAMMADUR RASOOL ALLAH,KI LAAZAWAL DARSGAH HUSSAIN HAI
english translation text: The never declining university of  La Ilaha Illallah Muhammadin Rasool Allah is Hussain
